falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 8% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish pattern completion rather than a consolidation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average crosses below the 50-day moving average on heavy volume (volume > 150% of 14-day average)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bearish technical divergence would contradict the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern and show a confirmed bear market phase

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 12.0 (its 2024 low) while the S&P 500 makes a new all-time high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination would indicate extreme complacency and invalidate the 'blowoff score' risk warning by showing a textbook 'sell-the-news' scenario

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
